notes:
v1.0.3

Added:
- New CLI: xixero license <KEY>, xixero stop, xixero status
- Running 'xixero' without subcommand starts the server
- Firebase Firestore license validation
- One-click installer exe (no terminal needed)
- API token auto-injected into web UI
- Silent logging (clean terminal)

Changed:
- License activation via terminal only
- Web UI opens directly to dashboard (no login page)
- Server blocked without valid license
- Discord @xixero1445 for license keys

Removed:
- Auth/login page from web UI
- Admin server (port 7861)
- Cloudflare tunnel
- BoltDB dependency
